Article Title: The hidden costs of excessive screen media use in kids
Article Text:
New research highlights how children in India exceed global

screen time guidelines

, with lasting impact on health and cognitive abilities

Multiple screens have become an integral part of children’s lives. But is it safe for young adolescents to be spending so much time on screen? Findings from existing research suggest that while devices like smartphones, laptops, tablets and TVs can aid learning, their excessive use is linked to adverse health and developmental outcomes.A recent study*, published in Indian Journal of Psychiatry, examined children and adolescents with mental disorders to assess their screen use habits. The findings are striking: Average daily screen time was 3.1 hours. Importantly, two-thirds of the 212 study participants (average age 13 years) exceeded the recommended screen time limits set by the American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP) and World Health Organization (WHO).These guidelines recommend no screen exposure for children under two years (except video calls), less than one hour per day for ages two to four, and a maximum of two hours daily for those five years and older.The study revealed that television (66%) and mobile phones (70.3%) were the most commonly used devices, among 212 children and adolescents who were part of the study. Alarmingly, 22.2% of children met the criteria for screen media addiction, based on DSM-5 standards for Internet Gaming Disorder.DSM-5 is Diagnostics and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders, fifth edition, a guide used by researchers to diagnose, classify and treat mental health disorders.Addiction was more prevalent among boys, those from joint or extended families, and children diagnosed with neurodevelopmental or disruptive disorders.Excessive screen use contributes to obesity, sedentary behaviour, poor dietary habits, and disrupted sleep. Cognitively, prolonged exposure can impair language development, executive functioning and emergent literacy skills. Research even suggests structural brain changes in preschool children with high screen exposure, particularly affecting white matter tracts (which act as brain’s communication networks), critical for learning and communication.Psychosocially, children addicted to screen media often display deception (sneaking or lying to use devices), preoccupation, withdrawal symptoms and conflicts within families. Screen use also interferes with friendships and family activities, while increasing vulnerability to cyberbullying, unsafe online content and negative emotional states.The study underscores the urgent need for parental awareness and regulation. Parents often allow children with neurodevelopmental disorders extra screen time as a coping mechanism, but this leads to more problems. In joint family settings, inconsistent parenting rules can further exacerbate the issue.In conclusion, screen media use among children is not inherently harmful, but its excessive and unregulated use poses significant risks to physical health, cognitive development and emotional well-being. With nearly one-fourth of children in psychiatric care showing signs of addiction, routine evaluation of screen habits and strict adherence to recommended guidelines are essential steps toward safeguarding the next generation.(* Problematic screen media use in children and adolescents attending child and adolescent psychiatric services in a tertiary care center in North India, by Venkatesh Raju, Akhilesh Sharma, Ruchita Shah, Ravikanth Tangella, Sana Devi Yumnam, Jyoti Singh, Jaivinder Yadav, and Sandeep Grover)
Article Summary: Two-thirds of the 212 study participants (average age 13 years) exceeded the recommended screen time limits set by the American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP) and World Health Organization (WHO) 22.2% of children met the criteria for screen media addiction, based on DSM-5 standards.

Article Title: Celebrity chef René Redzepi resigns from Noma over abuse allegations, says 'an apology is not enough'
Article Text:
Physical assault, public shaming, abuse





Celebrity chef René Redzepi, founder of iconic Danish restaurant Noma that won three Michelin stars and several other international recognitions for its New Nordic cuisine, announced his resignation in the wake of allegations of abuse and assault at the Copenhagen landmark. “I have worked to be a better leader and Noma has taken big steps to transform the culture over many years,” he wrote in the post's caption Thursday. “I recognize these changes do not repair the past. An apology is not enough; I take responsibility for my own actions.”Allegations against Redzepi are not new, but this time they did not go unnoticed. The New York Times reported a detailed account of employees' harrowing experience working under the world-famous chef -- just days before a Noma pop-up was scheduled to be launched in Los Angeles.Now, sponsors have pulled their funding from this LA project and protests against Redzepui were held.Those who worked under him recounted that going to work felt like going to war.The NYT report highlighted one 2014 incident when Redzepi ordered the entire kitchen staff to follow him outside the restaurant when a busy dinner time was going on. He was shoving a sous chef, a young man, who had put on a genre of music that the boss did not like.He punched the employee in the ribs as 40 cooks looked on -- as this was a ritual, with a new target every time.Redzepi was knighted by the Queen of Denmark. In 2013, Anthony Bourdain called him “without a doubt, the most influential, provocative, and important chef in the world.”A woman said she was punched by Redzepi when he saw her using a phone which was strictly prohibited during service. She fell against a metal counter and cut her hip. She said nobody said a word after that attack and she had to finish her shift.
Article Summary: René Redzepi, founder of iconic Danish restaurant Noma, resigns. Allegations of abuse and assault at the Copenhagen landmark. New York Times reported a detailed account of employees' harrowing experience working under the world-famous chef. sponsors have pulled their funding from this LA project and protests were held.

Article Title: Indian cobra vs Egyptian cobra: How these two venomous snakes differ in size, venom, habitat, and more
Article Text:
Poll Which cobra species do you find more fascinating? Indian Cobra Egyptian Cobra

Where Indian cobras and Egyptian cobras live

Indian cobra vs Egyptian cobra: Differences in size and appearance

Indian cobra vs Egyptian cobra: Differences in size and appearance ( Image source: AI-Generated)

Venom and snakebite risk

Venom and snakebite risk ( Image source: AI-Generated)

Hunting behaviour and diet

Defensive posture and behaviour

Defensive posture and behaviour ( Image source: AI-Generated)

Cultural and historical associations

Cobras are arguably the most identifiable venomous snake in the world. Their distinctive raised posture and flared hood enable them to stand out from the crowd. As such, they have featured prominently in history and folklore across the world.Although they share several physical traits, different cobra species have evolved unique characteristics shaped by their environments, behaviour, and hunting patterns across different regions of the world.The two most common species in the family of cobras include the Indian Cobra, whose scientific name is Naja naja, and the Egyptian Cobra, whose scientific name is Naja haje.Although the two species belong to the same family, they can be found in different locations and have many distinctive differences in terms of size, appearance, and behaviour.It is through these differences that we can understand the reason behind the two species being identified as significant predators and the reason behind the interest they have attracted over the years.The Indian cobra is found in a wide range, covering the Indian subcontinent. Its presence is noted in India, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Bangladesh, and Nepal. Unlike many other species of snakes, this cobra does not find it difficult to adjust to any new environment.Its habitats include forests, grasslands, and wetlands, and it is also found in areas around villages and farms.In this regard, this species can be found in places such as termite hills, rocks, thick vegetation, and abandoned burrows, where it finds protection and easy access to food. Thus, human encounters with this species are also noted in rural areas.In contrast, the Egyptian cobra is found in a very different geographical setting. Its range includes North Africa, where it is found in Egypt, Sudan, and surrounding countries. Its presence is also noted in the Arabian Peninsula.This species is found in dry or semi-arid zones, such as savannas, rocks, and desert fringes, but in these areas, this species is found close to water sources, which are home to the species it feeds on.Though these two species show the common characteristics of the cobra’s hood, there is a difference in the physical characteristics. The Indian Cobra has an average length of about 1 to 1.5 meters, though some can attain a length of about two meters.The most distinctive feature is the spectacle-shaped marking found on the back of the hood. When the snake flattens its hood as a defence mechanism, it resembles the shape of the glasses that people wear, and hence it is named the spectacled cobra.The Egyptian Cobra is larger and heavier compared to the Indian Cobra. It has an average length and weight, with some specimens attaining lengths and weights of about 1.5 to 2 meters, and some even attaining lengths of about 2.4 meters.It lacks the spectacle marking found on the Indian Cobra. Depending on the region and the habitat, the colour can vary from yellowish-brown, copper, dark brown, or even black.Both species have potent venom that affects the nervous system.The venom of the Indian Cobra contains powerful neurotoxins and cardiotoxins. These toxins disrupt the nervous and muscular systems. Breathing difficulties and paralysis can result if the snake bites and the victim is not treated promptly, especially if the snake has delivered a significant quantity of venom.The Indian Cobra is included in the “big four” list of medically significant species in India.The Egyptian Cobra also has potent venom that affects the nervous system. The effects of the snake’s venom can cause muscle paralysis and breathing difficulties, which can be life-threatening if medical treatment is delayed.Despite the reputation that these two species have, they tend to avoid human interaction as much as possible. However, they can deliver snake bites when they are accidentally provoked and feel threatened.Both species are predatory carnivores that prey on small animals.The Indian Cobra usually preys on rodents, frogs, lizards, and small birds. The rodents form an important prey in agricultural habitats because they act as pest controllers.The Egyptian Cobra has an almost similar diet and preys on small mammals, amphibians, and reptiles. Because it is larger, it can occasionally prey on slightly larger prey than the Indian Cobra.Cobras depend on venom to kill their prey. The snake strikes its prey and injects the venom into the prey. The snake then drops the prey and waits for the venom to kill the prey before it swallows it whole.One of the most famous characteristics of cobras is that they display a defence mechanism when they sense any threat. In this mechanism, the snake raises its anterior part and expands its hood by stretching its ribs behind its head.Both Indian and Egyptian cobras display this mechanism as a warning sign when they sense any threat. This mechanism makes the snake appear larger and can be accompanied by hissing and swaying motions.If the threat persists, the snake can even strike, but in most cases, the snake tries to flee the scene rather than striking the intruder.The Indian cobra has a strong association with South Asian culture and mythology. Cobras are said to be connected with several gods in Hindu mythology, especially Lord Shiva.The Egyptian cobra is said to be connected with the history of Egypt, specifically with the Egyptian kingdom. The emblem, or uraeus, featuring a cobra, was found on the crowns worn by Egyptian pharaohs, symbolising their powers and protection.These species are said to be two of the most recognisable venomous reptiles in the world, with their venom being a subject of study.
Article Summary: Cobras are arguably the most identifiable venomous snake in the world. Their raised posture and flared hood enable them to stand out from the crowd. The Indian Cobra is found in a wide range, covering the Indian subcontinent. The Egyptian Cobra is larger and heavier compared to the Indian Cobra. Both species have potent venom that affects the nervous system.

Article Title: Leanna Lenee Cheated Rumors: A viral video claims Leanna Lenee cheated on Travis Hunter and took $200K in alimony — here’s the truth
Article Text:
Travis Hunter and his wife Leanna Lenee (Image via Indtagram)

Did Leanna Lenee Cheat on Travis Hunter and Take $200K in Alimony? Here’s the Truth







Social media’s obsession with Colorado Buffaloes star Travis Hunter and his wife Leanna Lenee is unbelievable. Ever since the couple started dating and eventually got married, some people have constantly pushed narratives about them separating. In the latest round of rumors circulating online, claims suggest that Hunter was cheated on by his wife because she refused to sign a prenup and is now allegedly bragging about receiving $200,000 a month in alimony while vacationing in Cancun with a new partner.It’s a story designed to make you angry but there’s one major problem: None of it is true.To understand why this story is false, we have to look at the actual facts of Travis Hunter’s life versus the fiction created by "rage-bait" accounts.Travis Hunter and Leanna Lenee have been in a high-profile, committed relationship for years, but they recently got legally married. People had a major problem with them not having a prenup and so the narrative started. The account that posted this, "Obsrvate," is a known satire page. These accounts thrive on creating "fake news" that looks real enough to trick casual scrollers.There is no video, tweet, or Instagram story where Leanna claimed she "got what she wanted."In reality, the couple continues to appear together on their joint YouTube channel and social media, showing a united front.The old video of the couple has been used in the wrong context to fuel an already existing rumor that the internet wanted to believe wholeheartedly.Why do these stories spread so fast? This is a classic example of Rage-Bait. These posts are engineered to trigger a strong emotional response. By painting a picture of a hard-working athlete being "taken advantage of," the post ensures that people will comment in anger, share it with friends, and boost the post’s reach.The goal isn't to report the news, it's to use the names of famous people to generate engagement revenue for the account holder.In the era of AI and viral "parody" accounts, it is easier than ever to fall for a convincing lie. Travis Hunter remains focused on his record-breaking football career, and his relationship with Leanna Lenee remains a private matter that has been wildly misrepresented for internet "likes."Before hitting the share button on the next celebrity "scandal," it’s always worth checking the source. In this case, the only thing being "exposed" is the misinformation itself.
Article Summary: Travis Hunter and Leanna Lenee have been in a high-profile, committed relationship for years. People had a major problem with them not having a prenup and so the narrative started. The couple continues to appear together on their joint YouTube channel and social media, showing a united front.

Article Title: Tim Cook: Apple to celebrate 50th anniversary on April 1: Read CEO Tim Cook's 'Thank You' letter
Article Text:
Read Apple CEO Tim Cook’s message

Apple will mark its 50th anniversary on April 1. Started in a small suburban garage on April 1, 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne to make technology personal, Apple has now become a global tech titan. To mark the occasion, CEO Tim Cook shared a heartfelt “Thank You” message to the millions of employees, developers and customers who transformed a garage startup into a household name.From the wood-cased Apple I computer to the recently-launched MacBook Neo, the company’s product portfolio has evolved into a massive ecosystem of hardware and services. In his message, Cook reflected on the products that defined generations, including the Classics (The Mac and iPod), the Revolutionaries (iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and AirPods, and Modern Essentials: Services like the App Store, Apple Music, iCloud, and Apple TV.Fifty years ago in a small garage, a big idea was born. Apple was founded on the simple notion that technology should be personal, and that belief — radical at the time — changed everything.April 1st marks 50 years of Apple. From the first Apple computer to the Mac, from iPod to iPhone, iPad to Apple Watch and AirPods, as well as the services we use every day — the App Store, Apple Music, Apple Pay, iCloud, and Apple TV — we’ve spent five decades rethinking what’s possible and putting powerful tools into people’s hands.Through every breakthrough, one idea has guided us — that the world is moved forward by people who think different.That’s because progress always begins with someone — an inventor or scientist, a student or storyteller — who imagines a better way, a new idea, a different path. That spirit has guided Apple from the start. But it has never belonged to us alone.Every invention we bring into the world is just the beginning of a story. The most meaningful chapters are written by all of you — the people who use our technology to work, learn, dream, and discover. You’ve made breakthroughs and launched businesses. You’ve cheered up loved ones in the hospital and captured your toddler’s first steps. You’ve run marathons, written books, and rekindled friendships. You’ve chased your curiosity, found your new favorite song, and shared stories that connect us all.In your hands, the tools we make have improved lives, and sometimes even saved them. And that is what inspires us — not what technology can do alone, but everything you can do with it.At Apple, we’re more focused on building tomorrow than remembering yesterday. But we couldn’t let this milestone pass without thanking the millions of people who make Apple what it is today — our incredible teams around the world, our developer community, and every customer who has joined us on this journey. Your ideas inspire our work. Your trust drives us to do better. Your stories remind us of all we can accomplish when we think different.If you’ve taught us anything, it’s that the people crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do.So here’s to the crazy ones.The misfits.The rebels.The troublemakers.The round pegs in the square holes.The ones who see things differently.Here’s to you.
Article Summary: April 1st marks 50 years of Apple. CEO Tim Cook shared a heartfelt “Thank You” message to the millions of employees, developers and customers who transformed a garage startup into a household name. Cook reflected on the products that defined generations, including the Mac and iPod.

Article Title: Sam Altman: Two of the world's biggest travel companies 'react' as Sam Altman accepts that ChatGPT cannot do everything
Article Text:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman

What OpenAI pulled back

'India Well Positioned To Lead The World In AI': OpenAI CEO Sam Altman At AI Impact Summit

OpenAI starts testing ads in ChatGPT

ChatGPT-maker OpenAI has quietly backed away from its plan to handle bookings and purchases directly inside ChatGOT, opting instead to push transitions into third party apps. The move of the company first reported by The Information, marks a significant strategic retreat for the AI company, which had been testing integrated checkout features. This announcement made by OpenAI sent shares of Expedia and Booking.com soaring on March 5, with Expedia up by nearly 13% and Booking.com witnessed a rise of about 8%. As reported by Business Insider, the analysts at TD Cowen called the decision a “stunning admission,” noting that the vision of AI platforms replacing apps as the “new OS” has been delayed, if not derailed.As per analysts, OpenAI appears not willing to take the operational headache of commerce such as payments, cancellations, refunds and customer service complaints and that to in the complex travel sector.Online travel agencies (OTAs) carry legal obligations and liabilities that chatbots and search engines do not, making them better suited to handle the intricacies of bookings.In short, OpenAI may have concluded that it does not want to handle the cumbersome part of commerce as those tasks are operationally complex and less profitable for the company.There’s precedent for this retreat. Google’s “Book on Google” service, launched in 2015, was shut down in 2022 after failing to gain traction.Consumers often prefer established OTAs, which offer broader inventory and higher conversion rates.Also, the online travel portals have some legal obligations and responsibilities which are not there for chatbots and search engines.Last month, OpenAI started testing ads in ChatGPT. Sharing a blog post, the company said it has started testing ads in the AI tool in the United States and will apply only to logged-in adult users on the Free and Go plans. “We’re starting to roll out a test for ads in ChatGPT today to a subset of free and Go users in the U.S,” OpenAI said in an X post adding “Ads do not influence ChatGPT’s answers. Ads are labeled as sponsored and visually separate from the response. Our goal is to give everyone access to ChatGPT for free with fewer limits, while protecting the trust they place in it for important and personal tasks.”OpenAI said ads are meant to help fund the infrastructure needed to keep the Free and Go tiers running and to support broader access to AI tools. The company said it will study feedback closely before expanding the program.“Keeping the Free and Go tiers fast and reliable requires significant infrastructure and ongoing investment. Ads help fund that work, supporting broader access to AI through higher quality free and low cost options, and enabling us to keep improving the intelligence and capabilities we offer over time,” the company stated in the blog post.
Article Summary: ChatGPT-maker OpenAI has quietly backed away from its plan to handle bookings and purchases directly inside ChatGOT. The move of the company first reported by The Information, marks a significant strategic retreat for the AI company. The announcement made by OpenAI sent shares of Expedia and Booking.com soaring on March 5.

Article Title: Elon Musk Home: Inside Elon Musk’s $50,000 Texas home: Mom Maye reveals garage bedroom, shares one towel, and minimalist life
Article Text:
PC: X

Elon Musk’s home in Texas : Simple dining and minimal living, says Maye Musk

Elon Musk Becomes First Man To Have $500 Billion Wealth

Elon Musk's home in Texas reveals minimalist lifestyle

Public reaction to Elon Musk’s minimalist lifestyle

Elon Musk is the name everyone knows: Tesla, SpaceX, rockets, electric cars, and billions of dollars. And yet, his home in Boca Chica, Texas, is surprisingly ordinary, almost modest. At least if you judge by material things. Maye Musk, his mother, recently shared a peek into the house. She slept in the garage. The shower reportedly had just one towel, nothing extravagant or luxurious.The pictures show a bright, open house. White kitchen cabinets, a stainless steel fridge, a stove, and a farmhouse sink. On a dark wood coffee table sits a small rocket sculpture, probably a SpaceX nod. Nearby, a katana rests against the wall.A few books lie scattered, casually placed. No chandeliers, no rugs, nothing fancy. Just the essentials.The dining area has a simple table and a few chairs. One chair had a black jacket draped over it. The light from the window above the sink fills the space. Walls are bare. Furniture is practical. It all looks… usable, nothing more. People online were surprised. Some liked it. ‘Less stuff, more mental space,’ one person said.Others joked about the sword.Maye Musk also shared a personal daily story. When she was a child in the Kalahari Desert, she sometimes went weeks without water or a shower. She suggested that might have prepared her for Elon’s minimal living conditions. Sleeping in a garage and sharing one towel may seem odd to some. For Musk, it’s probably intentional.She shares a little sneak peek inside Elon Musk’s home with a minimalist lifestyle and how he keeps only his essentials.Back in 2020, Musk announced he would sell nearly all his properties. Seven California homes went on the market for around $137 million in total. He even tweeted, “Will own no house.” The Texas home seems to reflect that philosophy. Experts say that living with fewer possessions can help focus, reduce distractions, and simplify life. For someone juggling rockets, electric cars, and AI ventures, it makes sense.People online had mixed opinions. Some admired the simplicity, noting that fewer possessions let a person focus on what matters. Others were baffled. “With all his money… this is his house?” one user wrote. Musk’s home seems to spark a discussion about how billionaires can live differently, even when they could afford anything.
Article Summary: Maye Musk, his mother, recently shared a peek into the house. She slept in the garage. The shower reportedly had just one towel, nothing extravagant or luxurious. Musk’s home seems to spark a discussion about how billionaires can live differently.

Article Title: Stryker cyberattack: One of America’s largest medical device makers gives update on attack that Iran-linked hackers claim responsibility for; says, 'At this time ...'
Article Text:
Iran-linked hacker behind Stryker attack

Poll In your opinion, what is the most critical response for Stryker following a cyberattack? Restoring systems quickly Communicating with stakeholders

Updates shared by Stryker

03/12/2026 12:32 a.m. EST

We are continuing to resolve the disruption impacting our global network, resulting from the cyber attack.

At this time, there is no indication of malware or ransomware and we believe the situation is contained to our internal Microsoft environment only.

Our products like Mako, Vocera and LIFEPAK35 are fully safe to use.

We have visibility to the orders entered before the event, and they will be shipped as soon as our system communications are restored. Any orders that have come in after the event are being examined.

We are working to ensure our electronic ordering system is back up and running as quickly as possible.

It is safe to communicate with Stryker employees and sales representatives by email and phone, and within your facility.

We are committed to keeping our stakeholders informed as we manage this situation. There is nothing more important to us than the customers and patients we serve. Please visit Stryker.com/newsroom for daily updates.

03/11/2026

Stryker is experiencing a global network disruption to our Microsoft environment as a result of a cyber attack. We have no indication of ransomware or malware and believe the incident is contained.

Our teams are working rapidly to understand the impact of the attack on our systems.

Stryker has business continuity measures in place to continue to support our customers and partners. We are committed to transparency and will keep stakeholders informed as we know more.

US-based medical device and services provider Stryker said that a cyberattack has disrupted its global network. According to a Reuters report, the company revealed in a Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filing that the attack caused disruptions and limitations of access to some of its systems. The company has 56,000 employees and operates in 61 countries. Stryker confirmed the cyberattack and as per an update on its official website, it is “continuing to resolve the disruption … resulting from the cyber attack”. The firm further revealed that there is no indication of malware or ransomware and that “the situation is contained to our internal Microsoft environment only”.As per the Reuters report, an Iranian-linked hacking group claimed ‌responsibility for the destructive cyberattack on Stryker.The group has posted messages on its Telegram channel and has warned that the incident marks “the beginning of a new chapter in cyber warfare”.In the social media posts, the group reportedly claimed that it had seized 50 terabytes of company data, which it claimed was “now in the hands of the free people of the world.”
Article Summary: US-based medical device and services provider Stryker said that a cyberattack has disrupted its global network. The firm further revealed that there is no indication of malware or ransomware and that “the situation is contained to our internal Microsoft environment only” An Iranian-linked hacking group claimed responsibility for the destructive cyberattack.

Article Title: After investing billions of dollars, starting a 'costly talent war' in the tech industry, Mark Zuckerberg's Meta may miss an AI deadline it set for itself
Article Text:
Meta's highly anticipated AI model, codenamed Avocado, faces a two-month delay, missing its mid-March launch target. Falling short of rivals on internal tests, the model is now expected in May. This setback for Meta's ambitious AI spending raises questions about its ability to compete with industry leaders. Internal discussions even explored licensing Google's Gemini as a temporary solution.

'Nonsense!': Hawley FORCES Zuckerberg To Apologise; Big Rewind Ahead Of Social Media Addiction Trial

Meta's AI leaders have reportedly discussed licensing Google's Gemini as a temporary fix

Zuckerberg had tempered expectations for Avocado as early as January

Meta's next big AI model—codenamed Avocado—has been delayed by at least two months after falling short of rivals on internal benchmarks, the New York Times reported on Thursday. The model, which was originally targeted for a mid-March release, is now unlikely to ship before May, three people familiar with the matter told the publication. It's a significant stumble for a company that's poured billions into catching up in the foundational AI race—and one that raises questions about whether sheer spending can close the gap with Google OpenAI , and Anthropic.Avocado reportedly outperformed Meta's previous Llama 4 model and edged past Google's older Gemini 2.5, but couldn't keep up with Gemini 3.0 from November.That places it squarely behind the frontier, despite Meta committing up to $135 billion in capital spending this year—nearly double the $72 billion it spent in 2024.Perhaps the most striking detail from the NYT report: leaders within Meta's AI division have floated the idea of temporarily licensing Gemini to power the company's products while Avocado catches up. No decision has been made, but the fact that it's even on the table underscores how urgently Meta needs a competitive model in the market.Avocado is being built by TBD Lab, an elite ~100-person unit assembled under Alexandr Wang, the former Scale AI CEO whom Meta brought on as chief AI officer last June as part of a $14.3 billion investment. TBD Lab finished Avocado's pre-training late last year and began post-training in January, when the mid-March target was set. But some researchers have already departed, and Wang has reportedly clashed with Meta veterans Chris Cox and Andrew Bosworth over how the new models should improve the company's advertising business.On a January earnings call, Zuckerberg acknowledged the model wouldn't immediately leap to the frontier, saying he expected it to be "good" but more importantly show "the rapid trajectory we're on." A Meta spokesperson reiterated that line to Reuters, adding the company is "excited for people to see what we've been cooking very soon."Meta's next model after Avocado is reportedly already in the works—codenamed Watermelon.
Article Summary: Meta's highly anticipated AI model, codenamed Avocado, faces a two-month delay, missing its mid-March launch target. Falling short of rivals on internal tests, the model is now expected in May. Internal discussions even explored licensing Google's Gemini as a temporary solution.

Article Title: Microsoft: Tech Layoffs: Layoffs at Microsoft, Meta, Google, Twitter: What is 'career cushioning' and why it's important
Article Text:
As job cuts continue to rise in various industries, some employees are going for 'career cushioning'.

Q: What is career cushioning?

Q: Why is career cushioning important?

Q: How can I start career cushioning?

Q: What are some examples of career cushioning?

Q: Is career cushioning only for people in certain industries?

Q: How often should I review and update my career cushioning efforts?

Q: How do I know if my career cushioning efforts are working?

Q: How much time should I be dedicating to career cushioning?

NEW DELHI: Microsoft Corp is reportedly planning to cut thousands of jobs, with some roles expected to be eliminated in the human resources and engineering divisions, according to media reports on Tuesday.This move follows similar job cuts announced by other tech companies, such as Amazon, Meta Platforms , Twitter, Google , Salesforce and a host of other corporations.These job cuts are being attributed to slowing demand and a worsening global economic outlook. The move by Microsoft indicates that the tech sector may continue to shed jobs in the coming months.As job cuts continue to rise in tech and various other industries, some employees are choosing to proactively seek out new job opportunities while still employed. This strategy, referred to as " career cushioning ". Here is all you need to know on 'career cushioning'A: Career cushioning refers to the practice of building a diverse set of skills and experiences in order to make oneself more marketable and resilient to job loss or industry changes. This can include gaining experience in multiple areas of a field, developing a side hustle or passion project, or building a professional network.A: Career cushioning can help provide a sense of security and confidence in uncertain job markets and can also open up new opportunities for career advancement. It can also help you be better prepared if you do lose your job, making it easier to find new employment.A: There are several ways to begin career cushioning, such as:Building a diverse skill set through continuing education or volunteer workNetworking with professionals in your industry and other industriesBuilding a personal brand through social media and professional online presenceSaving money for unexpected career changes or job loss.A: Some examples of career cushioning include:-A software developer taking on freelance web design projects to gain experience in user interface design.-A marketing professional starting a blog to gain experience in content creation.-A sales representative taking on additional responsibilities in product development to gain experience in product management.A: No, career cushioning is applicable for people in any industry. It's about being proactive in preparing for potential changes in your career, regardless of the industry you're in.A: It's a good idea to review your career cushioning efforts regularly, perhaps once or twice a year. This will allow you to assess your progress and make any necessary adjustments to your plans. Additionally, keeping an eye on the job market and industry trends can help you anticipate and prepare for any potential changes in your field.A: You can gauge the effectiveness of your career cushioning efforts by monitoring your progress in gaining new skills and experiences, as well as the feedback you receive from your professional network and potential employers. Additionally, you may find that you are better able to adapt to changes in your industry, or that you have more opportunities available to you.A: The amount of time you should dedicate to career cushioning will depend on your individual goals and circumstances, however it's important to balance the time you spend career cushioning with your other responsibilities. A good rule of thumb is to spend some time each week or month working on career cushioning activities, but not to the point that it negatively impacts other areas of your life.
Article Summary: As job cuts continue to rise in various industries, some employees are going for 'career cushioning' Career cushioning refers to the practice of building a diverse set of skills and experiences in order to make oneself more marketable. This can include gaining experience in multiple areas of a field, developing a side hustle or passion project, or building a professional network.

Article Title: Churchill and Austen to be replaced by wildlife on British banknotes
Article Text:
TOI correspondent from London:





Winston Churchill, disliked in India for his role in the 1943 Bengal famine, and Jane Austen will no longer feature on British banknotes and instead be replaced by British wildlife.Churchill currently features on £5 notes with his quote “I have nothing to offer but blood, toil, tears and sweat”, and Austen appears on £10 notes saying: “I declare after all there is no enjoyment like reading!” JMW Turner appears on £20 and Alan Turing on £50 notes.The Bank of England announced Wednesday that following a public consultation on which themes to use on its next series of banknote design, nature came out top.The monarch will continue to feature on the front.“Within the nature theme, much of the feedback from respondents referred to wildlife that is native to the UK. The bank has also judged that wildlife images would be most effective for developing banknotes with security features,” the bank said. This means hedgehogs, badgers and puffins could replace historical figures, who were introduced in 1970.The bank will run a second consultation this summer to gather the public’s views on which wildlife to feature.Alex Burghart MP, shadow chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster, said: “It is deeply depressing that under Labour our national heroes are considered too ‘divisive’ to be on the banknotes. Most countries celebrate their history. Ours should too.”“Already children don’t have good enough knowledge of our own history and national heroes. This will make it worse,” said former British diplomat Ameer Kotecha, who has roots in Gujarat.
Article Summary: Churchill currently features on £5 notes with his quote “I have nothing to offer but blood, toil, tears and sweat’ Jane Austen appears on £10 notes saying: ‘I declare after all there is no enjoyment like reading!’ Bank of England will run a second consultation this summer to gather the public’s views.

Article Title: Up to 90% discounts: Dubai shoppers rush to Ramadan Super Sale at Festival City Mall before Eid 2026
Article Text:
Dubai Ramadan Super Sale: Up to 90% Off at Dubai Festival City Mall Before Eid

A shopping rush before Eid 2026 in Dubai



Dubai's Ramadan Frenzy: Are 90% Discounts a Desperate Retail Ploy?

Dubai retailers expect big turnout



Can Dubai Festival City Mall's 90% Ramadan Sale Deliver Before Eid 2026?





Dubai’s retail scene is buzzing this Ramadan as shoppers rush to grab massive bargains during a limited-time Ramadan Super Sale offering discounts of up to 90% at Dubai Festival City Mall. The promotional event, timed for the final days of the holy month, has turned the popular waterfront shopping destination into one of the city’s busiest retail hotspots.Running from March 12 to March 15, the sale is part of Dubai’s wider retail campaigns designed to boost consumer spending ahead of Eid Al Fitr. Participating stores across fashion, lifestyle and accessories categories are offering deep discounts, while entertainment venues and restaurants are rolling out special promotions for families breaking their fast or enjoying late-night outings.With Eid celebrations around the corner, residents and visitors are flocking to malls across the city to purchase clothing, gifts and household items. Retailers at the mall are offering markdowns of up to 90% on fashion items, along with up to 50% discounts on entertainment experiences. The shopping event also coincides with Dubai’s broader strategy of transforming Ramadan evenings into vibrant social and retail experiences.Visitors can explore seasonal attractions such as Majlis-style Ramadan lounges, cultural shows and family entertainment around Festival Bay, turning the mall visit into more than just a shopping trip. Retail experts say such promotions typically lead to a surge in footfall as residents prepare for Eid festivities. Seasonal sales events have long been a key feature of Dubai’s retail strategy. Major campaigns like the 3-Day Super Sale, Dubai Shopping Festival and Dubai Summer Surprises regularly offer discounts reaching up to 90% across hundreds of brands and thousands of stores citywide.Authorities and retail organisers use these promotions to stimulate spending, attract tourists and strengthen Dubai’s reputation as one of the world’s leading shopping destinations. Located along the historic Dubai Creek waterfront, Dubai Festival City Mall is one of the emirate’s major retail and entertainment hubs, hosting hundreds of international brands as well as restaurants and attractions.Beyond discounts, the Ramadan sale is designed to create a festive atmosphere that blends shopping with culture and family experiences. Evening events, dining promotions, and waterfront entertainment allow visitors to spend hours at the destination, especially after iftar when malls across the UAE tend to see their highest footfall. For many families, the sale offers the perfect opportunity to prepare for Eid celebrations, whether by buying new outfits, purchasing gifts for relatives, or simply enjoying Ramadan nights out.Retail analysts say Ramadan sales events have become increasingly important for malls and brands across the Gulf, particularly as consumers look for deals while preparing for Eid gatherings and travel. Deep discounts often encourage shoppers to purchase items they may have postponed earlier in the year, ranging from fashion and footwear to electronics and home décor.Industry experts believe that the limited-time nature of such sales, especially those lasting only three or four days, creates urgency among shoppers and drives large crowds to malls. Dubai has built a global reputation for retail tourism thanks to its large malls, international brands and citywide shopping festivals. Seasonal events during Ramadan add a cultural dimension to that reputation, combining traditional celebrations with modern retail experiences.For residents and tourists alike, the Ramadan Super Sale at Dubai Festival City Mall offers a chance to enjoy some of the biggest bargains of the season while soaking in the festive atmosphere of the holy month. As the sale continues through the weekend, shoppers across the city are expected to flock to participating stores, hoping to score some of the year’s best deals before Eid 2026 arrives.
Article Summary: Dubai Festival City Mall is offering discounts of up to 90% at the end of Ramadan. The sale is part of Dubai’s wider retail campaigns designed to boost consumer spending ahead of Eid Al Fitr. Retail experts say such promotions typically lead to a surge in footfall as residents prepare for Eid festivities.

Article Title: Irys Vtuber Apology: VTuber IRyS faces criticism for ChatGPT post and issues apology
Article Text:
Image Via X

IRyS deletes ChatGPT post after criticism and shares apology



“It seems that there are people who were offended, disappointed or concerned after reading my previous tweet. That was never my intention.

I sincerely apologize and have deleted the tweet.”





Popular VTuber IRyS recently faced criticism online after sharing a post about her interaction with ChatGPT. The Hololive English star had uploaded a screenshot of a short conversation with the AI chatbot. In the post, she joked that she tried to act a little mean to see how the AI would react. However, she quickly apologized to the chatbot in the same conversation because she felt bad right away.The post started spreading on social media soon after it was shared. While some fans thought the message was just a harmless joke, others were not happy about it. A few users raised concerns about people using AI tools like chatbots, saying that such technology can use large amounts of energy and water to run the data centers behind them.As the reactions continued to grow, IRyS decided to remove the original post from social media. After deleting it, she shared a message explaining that she never meant to upset anyone. She also said she understood that some people felt uncomfortable after seeing the tweet.In her apology, IRyS wrote,The situation quickly became a topic of discussion among fans and other internet users. Some people said the criticism was too strong for a simple joke about a chatbot. Others continued to talk about the bigger topic of artificial intelligence and how it affects the environment.At the same time, several fans came forward to defend the VTuber. They said the original post was not meant to hurt anyone and that the reaction online may have been an overreaction. Supporters also pointed out that many creators casually use AI tools today for fun or curiosity.IRyS is a member of Hololive English, a prominent VTuber group that is famous for their online streaming activities, gaming content, and music. Her debut was in July 2021 as part of Hololive English Project: Hope. Since then, she has managed to accumulate a huge following from her activities involving online streaming and music releases.The case seems to have cooled down after her apology post and deletion of her initial post. The controversy is a clear example of how a seemingly casual post online can spark a major debate, especially if it is related to new technologies like AI.
Article Summary: VTuber IRyS faced criticism online after sharing a post about her interaction with ChatGPT. In the post, she joked that she tried to act a little mean to see how the AI would react. She quickly apologized to the chatbot in the same conversation because she felt bad.

Article Title: Twitch Subscription Gifting: Twitch’s new ‘Gift ’em All’ feature could let users gift subs to entire streams
Article Text:
Image Via Twitch

‘Gift ’em All,’

Twitch testing feature that lets users gift subs to all viewers watching a stream

‘Gift ’em All’

“squeeze every penny”

‘Gift ’em All’





Twitch is testing a new feature that could change how viewers support streamers on the platform. The new tool, calledallows a user to gift subscriptions to many viewers at the same time. Instead of choosing a small number of people, the feature can give subs to everyone who is currently watching a stream and following the channel.The feature is still in the testing phase, but it has already caught the attention of many Twitch users. Some think it could lead to very large donations during live streams. Others are curious about how it will work if a stream has thousands of viewers watching at the same time.Theoption works exactly like its name suggests. With a single click, a user can gift subscriptions to all eligible viewers who are currently watching a stream. However, the subs will only go to viewers who are following the channel but are not already subscribed.Right now, the feature only appears on desktop browsers, and not everyone can see it. Twitch said the option will only appear from time to time in a small number of channels while the company tests how it works.The platform also explained that even when someone uses the feature, not every eligible viewer may receive a sub. This can happen because of things like lag, latency, or viewers joining and leaving the stream at the same time.One interesting part of the experiment is that there does not seem to be a strict limit on how many subs can be gifted at once. For example, Twitch shared an image showing that a user could gift 200 subscriptions for around $998. If a stream has thousands of followers watching, the cost could become much higher.The test comes after Twitch introduced another feature last year that allowed users to gift 1,000 subscriptions at once. That feature caused debate when a former Twitch manager claimed it was added tofrom users who like to donate large amounts.However, Twitch Chief Product Officer Mike Minton denied that claim. He said the feature was created to make things easier for a small number of users who already gift large numbers of subscriptions.For now,is still an experiment. Twitch will likely watch how people use it before deciding if the feature should be added to more channels in the future.
Article Summary: Twitch is testing a new feature that lets users gift subs to all viewers watching a stream. With a single click, a user can gift subscriptions to all eligible viewers. The feature is still in the testing phase, but it has already caught the attention of many Twitch users.

Article Title: World Sleep Day: 5 Powerful night rituals that can improve sleep naturally
Article Text:
Fix Your Sleep Naturally! Sadhguru’s 5-Step Routine for Deep Rest

Create a consistent night wind-down ritual

Practice foot soak meditation with aroma oils

Crystals that support restful energy

Chant the Nidra Gayatri Mantra

Healing codes to support sleep balance

The road ahead

Sleep is one of the most powerful healing mechanisms of the human body. When sleep is deep and uninterrupted, the brain repairs itself, hormones balance naturally and emotional stability improves. The body may feel tired but the mind continues to stay active. Late night screen exposure, irregular routines, stress and constant stimulation keep the nervous system in a state of alertness. As a result the body finds it difficult to enter deep restorative sleep.Yet in modern life many people struggle with sleep. As per NumroVani, How India Thinks Study, 86% people are facing sleep related issues knowingly or unknowingly.The good news is that sleep can be improved by consciously creating small but powerful nightly habits. When the mind receives repeated signals that the day is ending, the body begins preparing itself for rest.On World Sleep Day 2026, these five practices can significantly improve sleep quality and restore natural rhythms.Healthy sleep begins before we actually lie down in bed. The mind needs a transition phase between the activity of the day and the stillness of the night.Establishing a consistent wind-down routine every evening trains the brain to recognise that rest time.. Around thirty minutes before bedtime, reduce stimulation and slow down the pace of activity. Dim the lights, avoid intense discussions and disengage from work related tasks. Gentle reading, quiet reflection or writing down the next day’s priorities helps the brain release mental clutter. When this routine is repeated daily, the body automatically begins preparing for sleep even before reaching the bed.A warm foot soak before sleep is an extremely effective relaxation practice. The feet contain important nerve endings that influence the entire nervous system. When the feet are immersed in warm water, tension accumulated through the day begins to dissolve and the body gradually enters a state of calm. Adding a few drops of aroma oils such as lavender, chamomile, sandalwood or vetiver enhances this effect. Sitting quietly for ten to fifteen minutes with the feet in warm water while focusing on slow breathing turns this into a powerful meditation practice and prepares the body for deeper sleep.Crystals are known for creating a calming environment around the sleeping space. Lepidolite is widely recognised for its soothing properties and is associated with emotional balance and mental relaxation. Sugilite is a powerful calming stone that helps release stress and quiet the mind before sleep. Charoite, a rare crystal known for its deep violet colour and support the release of subconscious anxiety and mental tension. Keeping these crystals around the bed supports restful sleep.Sound vibrations have a direct influence on the mind and nervous system. The Nidra Gayatri Mantra is traditionally associated with peaceful rest and relaxation. Chanting this mantra before sleep creates rhythmic breathing and calms the flow of thoughts. Chant this mantra slowly twenty one times before sleep for the optimum results.Healing codes are powerful numerical sequences that support mental and energetic balance. One can write the below healing codes with blue pen on left side of body or chant them slowly in mind.10 42 789611 21 49556 17 112All these three codes are to be used simultaneously.Sleep better to have a more productive and joyous life which is aligned with rta.
Article Summary: Sleep is one of the most powerful healing mechanisms of the human body. When sleep is deep and uninterrupted, the brain repairs itself, hormones balance naturally and emotional stability improves. On World Sleep Day 2026, these five practices can significantly improve sleep quality and restore natural rhythms.

Article Title: Dubai Miracle Garden: Dubai Miracle Garden offers free entry for UAE residents from March 15 to 31: Dates and best timings to visit
Article Text:
UAE residents can enter Dubai Miracle Garden for free this March / Image: @dubaimiraclegarden

How does free entry to the Dubai Miracle Garden work?

Poll What aspect of the Dubai Miracle Garden excites you the most? The massive floral sculptures The themed installations

Why was the offer announced?

Best time to avoid crowds

Dubai Miracle Garden: UAE’s top attractions

More UAE attractions offering special deals





Residents across the UAE are being offered a chance to unwind and enjoy one of Dubai’s most colourful attractions for free. The iconic Dubai Miracle Garden has announced complimentary entry for UAE residents from March 15 to March 31, allowing families to visit the world-famous floral destination without paying an entry fee.The initiative comes at a time when regional tensions linked to the ongoing Iran-related conflict have dominated headlines. Organisers hope the gesture will give communities a chance to relax and spend quality time together.The garden will remain open daily from 9am to 9pm during the promotion period. Visitors do not need to make a reservation, and organisers say there is no cap on the number of people allowed to enter, meaning residents can walk in whenever they wish.Officials say the initiative is designed to give families and residents a refreshing break and encourage people to spend time outdoors enjoying one of the UAE’s most popular attractions.The free entry announcement comes as the Middle East continues to witness heightened tensions linked to the ongoing Iran conflict, which has affected travel, security measures and daily life across parts of the region.Authorities and institutions in the UAE have been introducing initiatives and community-focused activities aimed at reassuring residents and helping them maintain a sense of normalcy during this uncertain period.The free entry initiative is part of that wider effort to give people opportunities to relax and enjoy family outings.The promotion also arrives just ahead of Eid festivities, when many residents typically look for outdoor attractions and family entertainment options across the country.With free entry expected to attract large crowds, visitors planning a trip to Dubai Miracle Garden may want to plan their timing carefully.The best time to visit is early in the morning between 9am and 11am, right after the gates open. During this time, the garden is usually quieter, the weather is cooler, and visitors can enjoy better photography opportunities.Another good option is late evening after 7pm, when many daytime visitors begin leaving and the floral displays are illuminated with decorative lighting.Weekdays are generally less crowded compared to weekends (Friday to Sunday), when families and tourists tend to visit in larger numbers.Located in Arjan, Al Barsha South 3, Dubai Miracle Garden is widely recognised as the world’s largest natural flower garden, covering more than 72,000 square metres and showcasing millions of blooming flowers arranged in elaborate designs and structures.Since opening in 2013, the garden has become one of Dubai’s most visited seasonal attractions. Visitors come to see massive floral sculptures, themed installations and colourful pathways filled with vibrant blooms that change every season.From giant heart tunnels to aircraft-shaped floral displays and record-breaking installations, the attraction has become a favourite destination for families, tourists and photography lovers alike.The promotion is part of a broader wave of special offers across Dubai’s tourism sector. Some major attractions are rolling out discounted or complimentary access during the same period to encourage residents to explore the city and spend time with family.These initiatives aim to keep leisure activity strong across the UAE while offering residents affordable entertainment options during the busy Ramadan and pre-Eid period.
Article Summary: Dubai Miracle Garden has announced complimentary entry for UAE residents from March 15 to March 31. Visitors do not need to make a reservation, and there is no cap on the number of people allowed to enter. The initiative comes at a time when regional tensions linked to the ongoing Iran-related conflict have dominated headlines.

Article Title: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque deploys 100 taxis, extra buses as massive crowds expected for final Ramadan nights
Article Text:
Preparations for prayers

Increase in parking spaces

Expanded taxi service

Elevated bus services

Intensified patrolling and monitoring

Allocation of other services for maximum smooth operation





Ramadan is one of the most vital of the holy occasions in Islam and as the pious month comes to an end, worshippers will be planning trips to religious places for gratitude and prayers. Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, which is the largest mosque in UAE has amped up preparations for public safety and comfort as it awaits the arrival of thousands of worshippers for prayers in the final nights of Ramadan.The mosque has enhanced readiness across all its affiliated landmarks: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque in Abu Dhabi, Sheikh Khalifa Grand Mosque in Al Ain, Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque in Fujairah, and Sheikh Khalifa Grand Mosque in Ras Al Khaimah.The mosque aims to offer visitors a serene and spiritual atmosphere for the performance of daily prayers, considering the increasing turnout of worshippers during the blessed days and nights, especially for the 27th night of the holy month, when more than 70,000 people gathered in a single night in recent years. The centre is set to revive the spiritual rituals of the last 10 days by holding Taraweeh and Tahajjud prayers at its mosques.Tahajjud will take place daily at midnight (12:00 am) in a spiritual ambience led by the mosque's imams including Idris Abkar, Yahya Aishan, Alaa Al Mizjaji, Abdullah Al Baloushi, and Abdulbasit Abdulsamad, in addition to hosting reciter Raad Al Kurdi. 'The centre continues to broadcast prayers live daily through its official YouTube channel, Instagram account, and television coverage with Abu Dhabi TV and Fujairah TV.To facilitate access to the mosque and its affiliated landmarks, the centre has allocated more than 8,000 parking spaces at Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque in Abu Dhabi along with 1,500 spaces for women and over 60 spaces for People of Determination.More parking areas are also available near Wahat Al Karama, ADNEC and Zayed Sports City. Sheikh Khalifa Grand Mosque in Al Ain has allocated 2,176 parking spaces including 28 for People of Determination along with Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque in Fujairah offering more than 2,000 parking spaces.A detailed video explaining the parking zones and access gates as per the official maps has been posted on the centre's social media platforms.To manage the surge in visitors, the Integrated Transport Centre (ITC), an affiliate of the Department of Municipalities and Transport in Abu Dhabi shared that it has intensified traffic monitoring and expanded taxi and public services throughout the holy month of Ramadan.In order to efficiently serve the elevated number of visitors and worshippers, the ITC has assigned an estimated 100 taxis to operate daily. Moreover, additional vehicles have been made available during the last 10 nights of Ramadan, when visitor numbers typically rise for the nightly prayers.Inspectors and transport coordinators are to supervise operations on site with dedicated pick up and drop off zones having been designated in coordination with the mosque management.In order to manage the elevated traffic that is typical for this time of year in the areas surrounding the mosque, public bus services have been reinforced. This is aimed at making travel and navigation easier for residents and international tourists alike, without needing a car.Under the Ramadan plan, Route Q3 will now operate larger buses with capacity for up to 85 passengers, replacing the smaller vehicles previously used on the route while transporting a larger number of passengers with minimum traffic.During the evening hours, when visitors are higher, two additional buses are to operate and around 60 extra trips will be executed between Rabdan Bus Station and the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque stop. Three buses have also been allocated to transport passengers from Rabdan Bus Station to nearby suburban areas to help reduce waiting time.27 additional evening trips have been added to the mosque with bus routes X5, 54, 44 and 23 being adjusted to stop directly at the mosque.The ITC has been monitoring roads and signalised intersections around the mosque. With the help of its integrated traffic management system and surveillance cameras, it has been keeping an eye on vital areas through its traffic control room.Portable and fixed Variable Message Signs (VMS) have been installed to help motorists and visitors while road service patrols and towing teams are to respond quickly to accidents or breakdowns.Additionally, traffic patrolling will be intensified during iftar hours and the late-night prayer period when crowds increase in numbers.Not only in terms of transport and navigation, but authorities have also made initiatives to make the experience inside the mosque comfortable and memorable as well.The centre has provided approximately 1,500 prayer rugs for outdoor areas in addition to more than 30,000 disposable prayer mats around the colonnades.Around 70 electric carts have been designated for People of Determination and the elderly to transport them from the parking areas to the prayer halls. This is in addition to 3,515 comfortable seats and more than 50 wheelchairs for senior citizens and People of Determination.To ensure the safety of attending children, the centre provides identification wristbands at all information points to reach out to their guardians when in need.Lastly, ambulances, a field hospital and civil defence teams have also been stationed on-site to respond to emergencies, if any.The authorities noted that all these measures are aimed at ensuring a smooth experience for worshippers visiting the mosque, which is known to host some of the largest Ramadan prayer gatherings in the UAE.
Article Summary: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque in Abu Dhabi has increased parking spaces and expanded taxi and public services for the final nights of Ramadan. The centre is set to revive the spiritual rituals of the last 10 days by holding Taraweeh and Tahajjud prayers at its mosques.
